'''Cambrielle''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]. The [[City/Legends|city]] included the famed [[Cambriele Exploration Auditorium]], and was home to [[Cambriele SolidState]] and the popular [[Dusky Sky Café]].

{{City-stub}}
